title: viola pinnata subsp. multifida
intro: Viola pinnata subsp. multifida, also known as the multifida violet or multifida viola, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the Violet family. It is primarily used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Viola pinnata subsp. multifida include its potential to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and provide relief from symptoms of menopause and menstrual cramps. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which are popular herbal preparations for its medicinal properties.
